data.caption:
Opening Day Coming Soon to Gary’s!!!!!☀️⛳️🍔 Mini golf, mouthwatering eats, and good vibes await. Grab your family, grab your friends — it’s time to make memories at our family park.

📅 Opening Day: Sunday, May 17
 🕒 Hours: • Sunday (May 17): 11am–8pm • Mon–Thurs: 4pm–8pm • Friday: 2pm–6pm • Saturday: 9pm–11pm • Memorial Day (May 25): 11am–8pm

Let the summer fun begin! 🏌️‍♂️🍦

#funatgarys #getawayatgarys #MiniGolfFun #Summer2025 #FamilyFunDay

✨ Big news from Gary’s! ✨ This weekend is your LAST chance to enjoy the Jiffy Pup 🌭 before the restaurant closes for the season. Don’t miss out on your favorite bites! 🥤🍔

⛳ Putter Golf is still open too—just call ahead to make a reservation and we’ll save you a spot!

📅 Weekend Hours: 👉 Saturday: 8pm–11pm 👉 Sunday: 11am–8pm

Come out, make some memories, and let’s end the season on a high note! 💛

#Funatgarys#SupportLocal #SmallBusinessLove #LastCall #FoodieFavorites #WeekendPlans #GolfAndGrub #JiffyPup #FamilyFun #LocalEats #CommunityVibes

PLEASE come to Gary’s so we don’t have to mop in the rain!😂 #funatgarys#garysworkers#candychallenge#sweettooth#comeseegary#harddayatwork#fyp#foryoupage#trending#viral#funny#video#relatable#icecream#local#smallbusiness
